Program_Description: WIC serves more than 6 million pregnant and post-partum women, infants, and children in the US, providing nutrition assistance.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant and post-partum women, infants, and children
Eligibility_Requirements: Gross income of no more than 185 percent of the federal poverty level and at nutritional risk
